title: Code Design
text: Use R version >= 4.1 native pipe (|>) \(x) anonymous functions Try always check inputs top function Setup RStudio Prebundled Positron Use cli messages/errors use local_mocked_bindings() mock Includes several tests can run locally, use skip_if_no_cache()

title: Code Design
text: workflow hopefully simple: renmods_update() - Download cache data locally renmods_connect() - Connect *.csv.gz files collect() - Retrieve data R data.frame/tibble (reexported dplyr) renmods_disconnect() - Disconnect data base also family cache_xxx() functions controlling cache.

title: Code Design
text: Options set zzz.R via .onLoad() renmods.cache_dir: store downloaded data (defaults NULL) renmods.urls: URLs four data types Options set aren’t already present

title: Code Design
text: Data types available (‘this_yr’, ‘yr_2_5’, ‘yr_5_10’, ‘historic’) Update intervals (weeks) type data set, don’t think needs

title: Code Design
text: Cache functions cache.R cache_dir() (checks creates directory) cache_status() (returns data frame cached files, download dates, date ranges, file paths) cache_remove() (remove parts whole cache) cache_meta() similar cache_status() also used update/reset cache metadata. cache_meta() uses extract_date_range() pull original file name downloaded *.csv.gz. Currently date range file, file names change might break. Cache functions meant check cache, create cache prompt updates needed. sometimes bit convoluted extremely chatty, might worth adding silencing options future

title: Code Design
text: Downloads shouldn’t redownload data unless force = TRUE data ) present b) within many weeks updated (see renmods()$update) Use renmods_update_() internal function can download date/missing data renmods_connect() function used without chatter.

title: Code Design
text: renmods_connect() combines connects data default Users can supply date range data type wish connect date range, check metadata pick data types needed, prefilter data date. collect() exported dplyr (re-exports.R) users don’t use dplyr just get data.

title: Code Design
text: Standard checks checks.R Test utiliity functsion test-utils.R One thing note custom ask() function always returns TRUE non-interactive session.

what: Downloads and queries data from B.C. Environmental Monitoring Data System (EnMoDs)
title: Downloads and queries data from B.C. Environmental Monitoring Data System (EnMoDs)
text: R package download, import, filter data B.C.’s Environmental Monitoring Data System (EnMoDs) R. ‘renmods’ package replaces ‘rems’ support new data system released March 2026. EnMoDs dataset licensed Open Government Licence - British Columbia.

what: Get or create cache directory — cache_dir
title: Get or create cache directory — cache_dir
text: Returns path renmods cache directory. default, creates directory exist (user confirmation interactive mode). cache location can customized via renmods.cache_dir option.

title: Get or create cache directory — cache_dir
Get or create cache directory — cache_dir
text: check_only Logical. TRUE, checks cache directory exists without creating prompting user.

title: Get or create cache directory — cache_dir
text: Character. Path cache directory (check_only = FALSE) logical indicating cache exists (check_only = TRUE).

title: Get or create cache directory — cache_dir
Remove cached data — cache_remove
text: Deletes cached ENMODS data files. Use caution require re-downloading data. interactive mode, prompts confirmation deletion.

title: Remove cached data — cache_remove
text: types Character. data types remove. Either "" (default) remove cached data cache directory, one "this_yr", "yr_2_5", "yr_5_10", "historic".

title: Remove cached data — cache_remove
text: TRUE invisibly.

title: Remove cached data — cache_remove
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Remove all cached data cache_remove()  # Remove specific data types cache_remove(types = c("this_yr", "yr_2_5"))  # Remove just historic data cache_remove(types = "historic") } # }

title: View cache status — cache_status
text: Returns information cached ENMODS data including data type last downloaded, date range covers, file path.

title: View cache status — cache_status
text: Data frame columns: type: Data type (this_yr, yr_2_5, yr_5_10, historic) last_downloaded: Date/time last download date_range: Date range covered data renmods_version: Package version used download data path: File path cached data

title: View cache status — cache_status
code: # View status of all cached data cache_status() #> No cache

what: Connect to ENMODS data via DuckDB — renmods_connect
title: Connect to ENMODS data via DuckDB — renmods_connect
text: Creates DuckDB connection cached ENMODS data. database table can filtered using dplyr collecting data frame collect(). Using dates (date range) types (data types) prefilters data specific date range specific data file. supplied, dates takes precedence. data files required connected fewer data sources connected smaller dataset, quicker collect() function run.

title: Connect to ENMODS data via DuckDB — renmods_connect
Connect to ENMODS data via DuckDB — renmods_connect
text: dates Character Date vector length 2. Start end dates filtering data ("YYYY-MM-DD"). types Character. Data types connect . One "this_yr", "yr_2_5", "yr_5_10", "historic", "" (default ""). Ignored dates specified.

title: Connect to ENMODS data via DuckDB — renmods_connect
text: tbl_duckdb_connection object - lazy DuckDB table. Use dplyr functions filter/select, collect() load R memory.

title: Connect to ENMODS data via DuckDB — renmods_connect
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() # All data db <- renmods_connect()  # All current data db <- renmods_connect(types = "this_yr")  # Connect only to data types required for a specific date range db <- renmods_connect(dates = c("2025-01-01", "2025-02-01"))  # Use dplyr to manipulate the data library(dplyr)  # Explore the data and column names colnames(db) glimpse(db)  # Filter and collect specific data df <- db |>   filter(Location_ID %in% c("E327371", "E300230")) |>   select(     "Location_ID", "Location_Name", "Observed_Date_Time",     "Observed_Property_Name", "Result_Value", "Result_Unit",     "Analysis_Method_ID"   ) |>   collect()  # Remember to shut down the connection when you're done renmods_disconnect(db) }

title: Disconnect from the database — renmods_disconnect
text: Disconnect database

title: Disconnect from the database — renmods_disconnect
text: tbl DuckDB tbl created renmods_connect()

title: Disconnect from the database — renmods_disconnect
text: NULL invisibly. Called side effect disconnecting database.

title: Update cached ENMODS data — renmods_update
text: Downloads ENMODS data BC Gov saves local cache. default, missing outdated data downloaded.

title: Update cached ENMODS data — renmods_update
text: types Character. data types update. One "this_yr", "yr_2_5", "yr_5_10", "historic", "" (default "this_yr"). force Logical. TRUE, downloads data even cache --date (default FALSE).

title: Update cached ENMODS data — renmods_update
text: NULL invisibly. Called side effect downloading data.

title: Update cached ENMODS data — renmods_update
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Update current year data renmods_update()  # Update all data types renmods_update("all")  # Force update of specific types renmods_update(c("this_yr", "yr_2_5"), force = TRUE) } # }
